_meta.notes: Book II, Chapter 1 — The Rust Hand Walks. The Rust Hand begins making itself visible; iron starts arriving where iron wasn't ordered.

title: The Rust Hand Walks
theme: iron arrives where iron wasn't ordered
worldEvent: an iron coffin is found in a village square in Forsaken Village; no one will say who put it there
narratorPromptFragment: The current world-chapter is BOOK II, CHAPTER 1: THE RUST HAND WALKS. The Rust Hand has begun making itself visible. Iron arrives in places it wasn't ordered. An iron coffin appeared in Forsaken Village's square last week; no one will say who put it there. The Wyrm is more patient than the players know; the Hand is its means of being patient. Reference iron, rust, and weight when natural.
